_comment: Subagent Extension Configuration - Supported user-editable options with defaults
_asyncByDefault_description: Run subagents in the background by default unless a call explicitly sets async: false.
_defaultSessionDir_description: Base directory for per-run session logs when a tool call does not provide sessionDir.
_maxSubagentDepth_description: Default recursion limit for nested subagent delegation when no stricter inherited limit is active.
_superagents_description: Settings that apply only to the explicit Superpowers workflow.

superagents._defaultImplementerMode_description: Default implementer behavior for /superpowers runs: 'tdd' or 'direct'.
superagents._worktreeEnabled_description: Whether Superpowers parallel runs default to per-agent git worktrees when a call does not explicitly set worktree.
superagents._worktreeRoot_description: Optional directory where Superpowers parallel worktrees are created; null uses the system temp area.
superagents._worktreeSetupHook_description: Optional script path to run after each Superpowers worktree is created for parallel execution.
superagents._worktreeSetupHookTimeoutMs_description: Timeout in milliseconds for the optional Superpowers worktree setup hook.
superagents._modelTiers_description: Named model aliases that agent frontmatter can reference through the model field.

modelTiers._cheap_description: Fastest and lowest-cost starter tier alias.

cheap._description: Fastest and lowest-cost starter tier alias.

modelTiers._balanced_description: Default middle-ground starter tier alias for everyday work.

balanced._description: Default middle-ground starter tier alias for everyday work.

modelTiers._max_description: Highest-capability starter tier alias for the hardest tasks.

max._description: Highest-capability starter tier alias for the hardest tasks.

superagents._roleSkillOverlays_description: Extra skills appended per Superpowers execution role.

roleSkillOverlays._root-planning_description: Extra skills for the root planning/orchestration pass.
roleSkillOverlays._sp-recon_description: Extra skills for the reconnaissance role.
roleSkillOverlays._sp-research_description: Extra skills for the focused research role.
roleSkillOverlays._sp-implementer_description: Extra skills for the bounded implementation role.
roleSkillOverlays._sp-spec-review_description: Extra skills for the spec-compliance review role.
roleSkillOverlays._sp-code-review_description: Extra skills for the code-quality review role.
roleSkillOverlays._sp-debug_description: Extra skills for the bounded debugging role.
